calendar.matters:
Amended Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award And For Entry Of Judgment Thereon
Off Calendar Apr-22-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Aeron Nowell; respondent appearing in person on their own behalf.

No other appearances.

Not contested. Respondent stated that he did not provide notice to petitioners' counsel that he would be appearing in court today. He further stated that the reason he was appearing was because he received paperwork with the hearing information and was under the impression that he was expected to attend. The court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: PETITIONERS MICHAEL LIND and KARA LIND's Amended Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award And For Entry Of Judgment Thereon is GRANTED. No opposition filed. Order signed. Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)

Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award And For Entry Of Judgment Thereon
Off Calendar Mar-18-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: PETITIONER MICHAEL LIND, KARA LIND Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award And For Entry Of Judgment Thereon is OFF CALENDAR. Re-noticed for April 22, 2021. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)
